sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 힐튼, 2026년 1분기 RevPAR 3.6% 성장 및 조정 EBITDA 9억 100만 달러 달성, 연간 가이던스 상향

keyPoints.text: 1분기 시스템 전체 비교 RevPAR이 3.6% 증가했으며, 희석 주당순이익은 1.66달러, 특별항목 조정 후 희석 EPS는 2.01달러였습니다.
1분기 순이익은 3억 8,300만 달러, 조정 EBITDA는 9억 100만 달러로 전년 동기 각각 3억 달러와 7억 9,500만 달러에서 증가했습니다.
힐튼은 2026년 연간 조정 EBITDA 가이던스를 40억 2,000만 달러~40억 6,000만 달러로 상향 조정했습니다.

businessChanges.text: 힐튼이 Select by Hilton이라는 신규 브랜드를 론칭하며 독립 브랜드 정신과 힐튼 신뢰를 결합한 포트폴리오를 확장했습니다.
1분기 전년 동기 대비 순 유닛 성장률 6.3%를 달성했습니다.
2026년 1분기 말 기준 개발 파이프라인이 전년 동기 대비 5% 증가했습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 1분기 관리·프랜차이즈 수수료 매출이 전년 동기 대비 10.4% 증가했습니다.
2026년 연간 순이익 가이던스는 19억 900만 달러~19억 3,700만 달러로 제시됐습니다.
2026년 연간 자본환원 규모는 약 35억 달러로 계획되어 있습니다.

watchItems.text: RevPAR 성장률이 2.0%~3.0% 범위(통화중립 기준)의 연간 가이던스를 충족하는지가 핵심 관찰 포인트입니다.
Select by Hilton 등 신규 브랜드 확장이 파이프라인 6.0%~7.0% 순 유닛 성장 목표 달성에 기여할지 주목됩니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: pipeline to 527,000 rooms as of March 31, 2026, representing growth of 5 percent from March 31, 2025 • Added 16,300 rooms to our system, resulting in 10,900 net additional rooms for the first quarter, contributing to net unit growth of 6.3 percent from March 31, 2025 • In March 2026, announced the launch of a new brand, Select by Hilton, combining the trust and perks guests expect from Hilton with the creativity and spirit of independent brands, with YOTEL, an independent lifestyle brand, becoming the first brand under Select by Hilton through an exclusive agreement • Repurchased 2.7 million shares of Hilton common stock during the first quarter, bringing total capital return, including dividends, to $860 million for the quarter and $1,084 million year to date through  Normalized numeric aliases: 2.7 million = 270만 달러; $860 million = 8억 6,000만 달러; $1,084 million = 10억 8,400만 달러; $860 = 860달러; $1,084 = 1,084달러; 5 percent = 5%; 6.3 percent = 6.3%; 2.0 percent = 2.0%; 3.0 percent = 3.0%.

and currency neutral basis compared to 2025; full year net income is projected to be between $1,909 million and $1,937 million; full year Adjusted EBITDA is projected to be between $4,020 million and $4,060 million • Full year 2026 capital return is projected to be approximately $3.5 billion 1 Overview Christopher J. Nassetta, President & Chief Executive Officer of Hilton, said, "We delivered great top and bottom-line results for the quarter with RevPAR growth across all chain-scales and brands and customer segments. The results demonstrate a continuation of strengthening demand trends  Normalized numeric aliases: $1,909 million = 19억 900만 달러; $1,937 million = 19억 3,700만 달러; $4,020 million = 40억 2,000만 달러; $4,060 million = 40억 6,000만 달러; $3.5 billion = 35억 달러; $1,909 = 1,909달러; $1,937 = 1,937달러; $4,020 = 4,020달러; $3.5 = 3.5달러; 6.0 percent = 6.0%; 1,909 million = 19억 900만 달러; 1,937 million = 19억 3,700만 달러; 4,020 million = 40억 2,000만 달러; 4,060 million = 40억 6,000만 달러; 7.0 percent = 7.0%.

ended March 31, 2026, system-wide comparable RevPAR increased 3.6 percent compared to the same period in 2025 due to increases in both occupancy and ADR. Management and franchise fee revenues increased 10.4 percent compared to the same period in 2025. For the three months ended March 31, 2026, diluted EPS was $1.66 and diluted EPS, adjusted for special items, was $2.01, compared to $1.23 and $1.72, respectively, for the three months ended March 31, 2025. Net income and Adjusted EBITDA were $383 million and $901 million, respectively, for the three months ended March 31, 2026, compared to $300 million and $795 million, respectively, for the three months  Normalized numeric aliases: $383 million = 3억 8,300만 달러; $901 million = 9억 100만 달러; $300 million = 3억 달러; $795 million = 7억 9,500만 달러; $1.66 = 1.66달러; $2.01 = 2.01달러; $1.23 = 1.23달러; $1.72 = 1.72달러; $901 = 901달러; 3.6 percent = 3.6%; $300 = 300달러; $795 = 795달러; 16,300 million = 163억 달러; 10,900 million = 109억 달러; 10.4 percent = 10.4%.
